title: Cannot remove the last row with .spliceRows()
author: vvmnnnkv

comments.author: cm0s
comments.body: Same problem for me, but it has been resolved in the last version (working with 1.4.6, was not working in 0.7.0). This ticket should be closed.

comments.author: FriendOfTheNight
comments.body: I'm having the same issue with 1.6.0-1.6.2 and it makes it an absolute nightmare to work with. As far as I can tell it's completely random and I have to put in very hacky workarounds since splicing from the worksheet._rows array directly causes all sorts of issues too.

comments.author: fhw-help
comments.body: I still have that problem on version 3.8.2 are there any solutions yet?

comments.author: bepan
comments.body: Hey what about this issue? its still not working in version 4.2.0

comments.author: bepan
comments.body: A workaround for this is to always keep a row at the end with whatever values.

comments.author: GW-GhostWolf
iva2k
Mandeel
comments.body: using version 4.3.0, and still not deleting row without doing @GW-GhostWolf solution
